chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-246 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Hearing 1. For hearing of CMA No.1176/2026 2. For hearing of main case 04.02.2026. Mr. Muhammad Annas Makhdoom, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Faheem Raza, Advocate for the Respondent No.5. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, A.A.G. Mr. Muhammad Hasham, Asstt. Advocate General. --------------- Learned counsel are ad-idem that the controversy underpinning this matter is covered by the Order made by a learned Division Bench of this Court on 21.01.2025 in C.P No. D-2689/2017 and connected cases. They seek the disposal of the matter accordingly. So ordered. The Petition stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned Order, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to the matter at hand. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
